name: @wienerberliner/pi-footer
description: Custom pi footer panels for git status and current agent context tokens.

scripts.verify:fast-mode: rm -rf /tmp/pi-footer-fast-mode-verify && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/pi-footer-fast-mode-verify scripts/verify-fast-mode.ts extensions/fast-mode.ts && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node /tmp/pi-footer-fast-mode-verify/scripts/verify-fast-mode.js
